title: Introducing Plumbed, self-healing integrations in days, not months
description: If you’ve ever shipped a “finished” integration only to spend the next months babysitting it, you already know the real cost isn’t the build, it’s the uptime. At Plumbed.io, we’re building an AI-native integration platform that takes ownership of the full lifecycle: from prompt-driven setup to monitoring, self-healing, and continuous updates when APIs change. Build integrations in days, not months via a conversational, prompt-driven workflow Automated mapping and transformation for real-world data (ETL) Self-healing operations: monitoring, proactive error handling, and quick reruns/fixes Governed AI + human-in-the-loop for production control and visibility Flexible deployment: managed cloud or on-prem/custom infrastructure We work on practical integration challenges, like: launching new commerce/marketplace channels faster, connecting partner-operated stores to HQ systems (APIs, CSVs, scheduled exports), turning messy store data into stable analytics pipelines. If this sounds like y...
